items.title: Screener schema supports explainable results
items.description: DuckDB schema versions screener result rows with total score, score components, matched rules, and risk flags.

items.title: Deterministic screener bootstrap exists
items.description: A developer can regenerate screener_run and screener_result from the READY snapshots and current analysis artifacts.

items.title: Dedicated screener APIs return latest run and results
items.description: Backend exposes latest/by-id screener run endpoints, and app smoke verifies both summary and result-list reads.

items.title: Query path is read-only and stable
items.description: Runtime bootstrap happens before serving, while repo reads use explicit DuckDB read-only connections to avoid lock conflicts and write-on-read side effects.
